title: Silk Sleep Mask, 22-Momme 100% Pure Mulberry Silk Light-Blocking Eye Mask with Adjustable Strap, Hypoallergenic, Gifts for Women and Men（Pink）
features: Premium Silk Fabric:The sleep mask is made of 100% natural skin-friendly silk, and the soft padding inside makes the whole eye mask comfortable to wear. Silk fabric is soft and smooth, breathable, cool and refreshing, suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive skin.

Effective Light Blocking:One side of the eye mask is made of black mulberry silk fabric, which fits perfectly on the face while effectively blocking light, providing you with the best quality sleep environment.

Fine Care for Your Skin:Silk eye masks for sleeping have a low absorption rate, helping the skin care products on your face to absorb better. They reduce friction between the sleeping mask and your face while locking in skin moisture.

Adjustable Elastic Band:The sleep eye mask has an adjustable elastic band, ensuring it won't move or fall off while you sleep. It fits all head circumference sizes to help you create the most comfortable sleeping position without tangling your hair.

Perfect Gift Choice:Our sleep mask is a unique and thoughtful gift for both women and men, perfect for any occasion such as Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving, or birthdays. It creates a more comfortable and restful sleep environment, allowing your loved ones to enjoy a peaceful night's sleep every night. Soft and comfortable, it's also ideal for flying and traveling. The beautiful gift packaging makes it an excellent choice for expressing care and love.

Why Choose Aosun:Aosun is committed to improving everyone's sleep and never stops innovating. We are open to suggestions. If you have any questions about our silk eye masks, please feel free to contact us.
